getCompiledReport(String) - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.BaseReportCtl
Returns the compiled JasperReport for the given JRXML path, compiling it on the first call and caching the result in the ServletContext under BaseReportCtl.getCompiledReportKey().
getCompiledReportKey() - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.BaseReportCtl
Returns the unique key used to cache the compiled JasperReport in the ServletContext.
getCompiledReportKey() - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.CollegeReportCtl
Returns the ServletContext cache key for the compiled college report.
